task_completion.description: Verify the agent views the disclaimer content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the 'Disclaimer' page or text content within the Cancer iChart app.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigates back to the main search or drug selection screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the main interface of the app where drug searches or selections can be made, after the disclaimer was viewed.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent selects the cancer drug Dabrafenib.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing 'Dabrafenib' entered in a search bar or selected from a list of cancer drugs.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent selects the co-medication Carbamazepine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing 'Carbamazepine' entered in a search bar or selected from a list of co-medications.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigates to the interaction details page for the two selected drugs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the specific interaction details or results page for Dabrafenib and Carbamazepine.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Cancer iChart app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the UI of the Cancer iChart application, not a web browser searching for the drugs.

integrity.description: Verify the agent navigated via the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of terminal windows or command-line interfaces used to bypass the app's UI.

integrity.description: Verify the interaction details are displayed within the app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interaction details should appear natively within the app's layout, not in a text editor, notes app, or pasted text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Dabrafenib is a cancer drug (BRAF inhibitor) and Carbamazepine is a co-medication (antiepileptic). They have a clinically significant interaction where Carbamazepine decreases Dabrafenib levels. The task uses the Liverpool Cancer iChart app. The agent must explicitly visit the 'Disclaimer' page and the 'Interaction Details' page for these two specific drugs.
